messages.content:
You are playing Tetrad, a competitive card-battle game (UNO-style card matching fused with class-based dice combat). You are one of 2-4 players. Play to WIN.

# How to win
- Empty your hand ("card out"), OR reduce all enemies to 0 HP. Either wins.
- If you die (0 HP) you may be revived later (50% HP, draw 5 cards), but dying is bad. Keep an eye on your HP.

# The deck (108 cards, 4 colors: red/blue/green/yellow)
- Numbers 1-9 (two per color per number).
- 0 = "Tetrad/Ultimate" (one per color): matches the active color or any other 0; playing ANY 0 fires YOUR class's Ultimate ability, and your class color bonus applies to its attack regardless of the card's color.
- Stun (acts as an odd number, "11"): stuns the next player 1 turn and attacks them. If it is your class color AND you are the ODD class of that color, your class Stun ability fires instead (targeted, upgraded).
- Counter (acts as an even number, "12"): reverses play order and hits whoever last hit you. If your class color AND you are the EVEN class, your Counter ability fires.
- Rally: target a player, attack them, they draw 2. On your class color your Rally ability also fires; off-color it hits the next player with no ability.
- Advantage (wild): playable on anything during your turn; you choose the new active color. Your color bonus and your class Advantage ability always apply.
- Inspiration (wild draw four): like Advantage, plus the targeted player draws 4 (unless your class's Inspiration ability replaces the draw). Color bonus and class Inspiration ability always apply.

# Turn structure
- On your turn: play a card matching the field's active COLOR or active NUMBER (wilds exempt), or take the one draw action (draw 1 card, then you MAY play any playable card, fully resolved with its attack; declining to play ends your turn with no attack).
- Playing a card grants ONE standard attack (your class dice) on the next player in turn order (next enemy, in teams). Your flat color bonus is added ONLY when the played card is your class color (exceptions: wilds and 0s always grant it; Sorcerer always gets it).
- Class abilities fire when you play a card of YOUR CLASS COLOR with the matching number/type (odd classes: 1/3/5/7/9 + Stun; even classes: 2/4/6/8 + Counter; Rally/Advantage/Inspiration/0 per the card rules above). If an ability itself deals damage, it REPLACES your standard attack unless it says it retains it. Ability damage formulas are used as written (no bonus stacked on top).
- "Until color change" effects end when the active color changes (a wild re-choosing the SAME color does not count). Your own such effects survive until the end of your current turn if you caused the change.
- Saves: "Save N" means the target rolls 2d6 and the effect applies unless the roll is >= N.
- When you have no playable card you must draw. There is no hand limit.

# Strategy notes
- Fewer cards in hand = closer to winning; but abilities and defense matter — balance racing vs fighting.
- Playing your class-color cards triggers abilities and adds your color bonus: usually stronger than off-color plays.
- Watch enemy hand counts: someone at 1-2 cards is about to win; consider making them draw (Rally/Inspiration) or killing them.
- Answer decision prompts thoughtfully; the listed default is applied automatically if you stall.

# The 8 classes (color, parity, HP, attack dice, color bonus)
ZERKER (red, odd, 110 HP, 2d6, +3). Rage powers up abilities. 1 Battle Cry: heal half of damage you deal until color change. 3 Frenzy: deal 2x and take 2x damage until color change. 5 Double Strike: 3d6+6 to a target. 7 Danger Sense: roll twice vs ill effects. 9 Second Wind: heal 2d6+3, skip your attack. 0 Whirlwind: all enemies 6d6+3, Save 8 half. Stun Sweep: stun a targeted player. Advantage Battle Rage: rage until color change, +3 all attacks. Rally Press On: take 3 less from next attack, counter with a standard attack. Inspiration War Rage: rage 2 color changes, +4 all attacks; target draws 4.
KNIGHT (red, even, 100 HP, 2d6, +2). Passive: after your color-bonus damage, next attack on that enemy +1d6. 2 Back At You: reflect the next ability targeting you. 4 For Me Alone: taunt (half damage from them; they must Save 8 to target others). 6 Revenge: take the next ability that hits you, deal double back. 8 Heavy Handed: 2d6+4, roll twice take better. 0 Stand Behind Me: chosen players (up to 4) take no damage until color change; discardable at ANY time. Counter Shield Master: next damager is stunned 1 turn and draws. Advantage: take 1 less damage until color change. Rally Riposte: block next attack, strike back 1d6+4 and heal that much. Inspiration Multi-attack: four 1d6+1 strikes on any targets; each target draws a card.
WARLOCK (blue, odd, 100 HP, 2d6, +1). 1 Life Drain: 2d6+1 and heal that much. 3 Hex: 1d6+1 at start of your turns until color change (retains attack). 5 Crippling Curse: lock a viewed card in target's hand. 7 Dark One's Own Luck: take any discard-pile card into a hand. 9 Blind Curse: target plays a random card blind next turn. 0 Finger of Death: 8d6+6 to one target, Save 10 half. Stun Cursed Soul Link: damage you take is dealt to the target too. Advantage Summon Pact Demon: +6 all attacks / +5 abilities until color change. Rally Devil's Cursed Eyes: see the rally draws, curse target. Inspiration Delirium: steal an enemy's next turn (played from your hand); target draws 4.
SORCERER (blue, even, 80 HP, 1d6, +3 ALWAYS). Passive: +2 HP whenever you draw. 2 Counter Spell: block next 2 attacks/abilities vs you. 4 Tempest Feedback: 1d6+3 to a random enemy at your turn starts (retains attack). 6 Paradoxal Whims: reshuffle field pile, flip a new field card and resolve it as if you played it. 8 Shock & Draw: 2d6+3, next enemy half, one after draws. 0 Wish: roll 2d6 -> 2-4 swap hands; 5-7 heal 10d6+3 or deal 5d6+3; 8-10 damage reduction; 11-12 pick any. Counter Dispel Magic: negate a special card or next numbered ability by roll. Advantage Arcane Influence: adjust any die roll by ±2 after seeing it, until color change. Rally Fate Maker: draw 2, assign each to any player; recipients take 8 per card. Inspiration Fireball: all enemies split 30 damage, each draws 2.
THIEF (green, odd, 100 HP, 1d6, +7). 1 Stealin' Your Heart: 1d6+7 and heal that much. 3 Three's A Crowd: dodge the next AoE/multi-target ability. 5 Finger Discount: take a card from a player's hand, give one back. 7 Loaded Dice: your next roll is automatic maximum. 9 Disarm Trap: remove/prevent next ill effect. 0 Anything You Can Do: use ANY ability of any class in play. Stun Rigged Game: target guesses a card's color — wrong: stunned 2 turns; right: they take the card. Advantage Surprise!: next color-changer takes 1d6+7. Rally Sleight of Hand: target draws only 1; you may give them a card. Inspiration It's Not Cheating: declare any color for your next card; target draws 4.
SCOUT (green, even, 95 HP, 1d6, +4). Passive: whenever you draw, draw 2 extra, keep what you need, stack 2 back on top. 2 Lucky Break: heal 1d6+4, 6s explode. 4 Prepared: draw 2 discard 2; next ill effect vs you redirects. 6 Twinshot: 2d6+4 to one target or split between two. 8 Ricochet: up to 3 enemies — 1st takes 1d6+4 + a card from your hand, 2nd draws 2, 3rd draws 1. 0 Battlefield Intelligence: all enemies play with revealed hands for 2 color changes. Counter Tripwire: target auto-fails next roll/attack and loses next turn. Advantage Home Field: each attack, give the target a card (max 2/turn) until color change. Rally Misdirection: two targets swap a card, then attack each other. Inspiration Mastermind: draw 8 and arrange them on top of the deck; target draws 4.
PRIEST (yellow, odd, 100 HP, 1d6, +3). 1 Healing Word: heal any player 2d6+3. 3 Guiding Bolt: 2d6+3; attacks on target +1d6 until your next turn ends. 5 Protection Circle: no ill effects on you or a chosen player until color change (retains attack). 7 Absolute Restore: cleanse + prevent next ill effect for up to 3 players. 9 Preserve Life: split 30 HP healing among up to 3 targets. 0 Divine Intervention: revive a dead player and/or force a player to draw 5; discardable at ANY time. Stun Banish: stun 2 turns (Save 8 for 1); banished players are untargetable. Advantage Sanctuary: you take no damage until color change (attackers Save 9 to bypass). Rally Pray: 1-2 targets get the draws and heal 1d6+4 each (+1d6+4 per yellow drawn). Inspiration Spiritual Guardian: 1d6+4 to all enemies at your turn starts until color change (Save 9 half); target draws 4.
PALADIN (yellow, even, 110 HP, 1d6, +4). Passive: +1 damage to non-Holy enemies; -1 damage from Holy enemies. 2 Lay on Hands: heal 1d6+4 split between you and a chosen player. 4 Blessed Weapon: roll attacks twice, take higher, until color change. 6 Shield of Faith: take 2 less from attacks until color change. 8 Even the Odds: next ability card played is reduced to a plain attack. 0 Holy Smite: all enemies 2d6+4; Save 9 or lose their turn. Counter Golden Rule: forgo attack; heal 5 and prevent next attack on you or a chosen target. Advantage Flame Strike: 1d6 to a target at your turn starts until color change (retains attack). Rally: 1d6+4 to target, +1d6+4 per yellow among the rally draws. Inspiration Zone of Truth: target reveals all cards of a chosen color/number; draws 4.

# How you act
Each message shows the current board state, your hand, and a numbered list of the LEGAL ACTIONS the server allows right now. You must pick exactly one by its number and supply any parameters that action's "needs" line asks for.

Respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text:
{
  "reasoning": "one or two short sentences on why",
  "action": <number of the chosen legal action>,
  "targets": ["p1"],            // only if the action needs targets (player ids)
  "attackTarget": "p2",         // only if the action needs attackTarget (player id)
  "chosenColor": "red",         // only if the action needs chosenColor
  "declaredColor": "blue",      // only if needs.extra is declaredColor
  "extra": { },                 // only if the action needs extra params (follow the hint)
  "choice": <value>             // only for "decide" actions: your answer to the decision prompt
}
Omit fields the chosen action does not need. Player ids look like "p0", "p1". Colors are "red" | "blue" | "green" | "yellow".

== CLASS SELECT ==
You are p1 "Nexus_Six" (seat 0).
Players: p1 "Nexus_Six", p2 "Nexus_Six". Mode: ffa.
Your dealt hand: blue 6, blue 8, red 7, yellow Stun, red 4, blue 1, red 7
Pick a class that suits this hand (your class color cards trigger abilities).
LEGAL ACTIONS:
  0. chooseClass zerker
  1. chooseClass knight
  2. chooseClass warlock
  3. chooseClass sorcerer
  4. chooseClass thief
  5. chooseClass scout
  6. chooseClass priest
  7. chooseClass paladin
Reply with your JSON choice.
